title: Monetary Penalty on IIFL Samasta Finance Limited for KYC Violations and Fraud Risk Management Non-Compliance
description: <cite index="41-3,41-4">The Reserve Bank of India imposed a monetary penalty of ₹3.90 lakh on IIFL Samasta Finance Limited for deficiencies in regulatory compliance under an order dated June 5, 2026, including violations of KYC guidelines and fraud risk management rules for NBFCs.</cite> <cite index="41-6">The company failed to establish a robust software system for monitoring suspicious transactions and to ensure accurate disclosure of fraud details for FY 2024-25.</cite>
